fields.name: Package Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the package that contains the data that is being created.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID for the table that is part of the migration process.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the migration record.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Field ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number ID of the field in the migration table. All available fields are listed.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value that has been entered for the field in the configuration package record. As needed, you can update and modify the information in this field, which you can use for comments. You can also correct the errors that are preventing the record from being part of the configuration. This is indicated when the Invalid check box is selected.

fields.name: Invalid
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the data in the migration field is valid. If it is not valid, then you can review the associated error in the Config. Package Errors window.
